doc: JSON-Schema features Cohere structured outputs (response_format json_object/json_schema) does NOT support, per the 'Unsupported schema features' / keyword-support table of the Cohere docs (Schema Composition: allOf/oneOf/not; Numeric Ranges: minimum/maximum; Array Length Ranges: minItems/maxItems; String Length: minLength/maxLength; uniqueItems — marked 'No' for both Structured Outputs (JSON) and Structured Outputs (Tools); it is supported only under regular Tool Use with strict_tools=False, which is outside this pack's scope). A schema using any of these keywords is rejected on the structured-output path. SCOPE: structured-output / response_format schemas. Supported and NOT flagged: anyOf, $ref/$def, enum, const, pattern. CAVEAT (not yet a rule): regex anchors (^, $, ?=, ?!) inside a 'pattern' are unsupported by Cohere — detecting them needs value-inspection (a new rule kind), deferred to v0.4.

rules.reason: Cohere structured outputs do not support the 'allOf' composition keyword; merging subschemas cannot be guessed safely.
Cohere structured outputs do not support the 'oneOf' composition keyword (use 'anyOf', which is supported).
Cohere structured outputs do not support the 'not' composition keyword.
Cohere structured outputs do not support the 'minimum' numeric range keyword.
Cohere structured outputs do not support the 'maximum' numeric range keyword.
Cohere structured outputs do not support the 'minItems' array length keyword.
Cohere structured outputs do not support the 'maxItems' array length keyword.
Cohere structured outputs do not support the 'minLength' string length keyword.
Cohere structured outputs do not support the 'maxLength' string length keyword.
Cohere structured outputs do not support the 'uniqueItems' array keyword (marked 'No' for both Structured Outputs columns; only allowed under regular Tool Use with strict_tools=False).
